mission.title: litmus: "Failed to get argo pod logs" is not intuitive
mission.description: "Failed to get argo pod logs" is not intuitive. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current litmus deployment
steps.description:
Verify your litmus version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus
helm list -n litmus 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working litmus installation.

steps.title: Review litmus configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litmus configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus
kubectl get configmap -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litmus
```
When we initiate the chaos experiment, `{"mainLogs":"Failed to get argo pod logs"}` is shown when a workflow is not ready.

steps.title: Apply the fix for "Failed to get argo pod logs" is not intuitive
steps.description:
when update ChaosExperiment log can't know what is problem. so change error to log message for better debugging
```yaml
1 mainLogs: W0102 08:07:39.397356       1 client_config.go:552] Neither --kubeconfig nor --master was specified.  Using the inClusterConfig.  This might not work.
2 2025/01/02 08:07:39 
3
4 ChaosEngine Name : pod-delete-prs65csg
5
6 2025/01/02 08:07:39 Created Resource Details: 
7 {pod-delete-prs65csg litmuschaos.io v1alpha1 ChaosEngine litmus }
8
W0102 08:07:39.430842       1 client_config.go:552] Neither --kubeconfig nor --master was specified.  Using the inClusterConfig.  This might not work.
9 2025/01/02 08:07:39 Starting Chaos Checker in 1min
10 2025/01/02 08:08:39 Checking if Engine Comp
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus
kubectl get events -n litmus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in ""Failed to get argo pod logs" is not intuitive" is functioning correctly.
